title: Ashley Oosthuizen remains healthy and busy in Thai prison, says mother
description: GEORGE NEWS - Ashley Oosthuizen, the young...
bodyText:
[{"type":"contributor","text":"Kristy Kolberg","contributorName":"Kristy Kolberg","contributorDate":"Thursday, 29 January 2026, 08:01"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Ashley was recently disciplined after accidentally leaving her bag behind on Christmas Day. As punishment, she has been assigned to clean toilets for two weeks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - Ashley Oosthuizen, the young woman from George imprisoned in Thailand, remains in good health and is coping well under the circumstances, according to her mother, Lynn Blignaut.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - Ashley Oosthuizen, the young woman from George imprisoned in Thailand, remains in good health and is coping well under the circumstances, according to her mother, Lynn Blignaut."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Blignaut shared an update on Facebook this week, stating that she did not visit Ashley as planned, as she is still in Bangkok, but expects to return in time for their scheduled visit on Friday. Despite the distance, Blignaut received a letter from her daughter, offering reassurance about her well-being."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Ashley is doing well overall and is healthy, which we are very grateful for,” Blignaut said.","html":"“Ashley is doing well overall and is healthy, which we are very grateful for,” Blignaut said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ashley has recently taken on additional daily responsibilities in prison, including assisting with serving lunch to officers. She has also been kept busy with translation work, helping translate between English and Mandarin.","html":"Ashley has recently taken on additional daily responsibilities in prison, including assisting with serving lunch to officers. She has also been kept busy with translation work, helping translate between English and Mandarin."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to her mother, Ashley is particularly grateful for the opportunity to practise her Mandarin using a computer, something she has not had the chance to do for some time.","html":"According to her mother, Ashley is particularly grateful for the opportunity to practise her Mandarin using a computer, something she has not had the chance to do for some time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Blignaut said her daughter found it frustrating not being able to practise writing, but viewed the translation work as a positive development.","html":"Blignaut said her daughter found it frustrating not being able to practise writing, but viewed the translation work as a positive development."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“She gave glory to the Lord for opening this door of opportunity,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, Ashley was recently disciplined after accidentally leaving her bag behind on Christmas Day. As punishment, she has been assigned to clean toilets for two weeks.","html":"However, Ashley was recently disciplined after accidentally leaving her bag behind on Christmas Day. As punishment, she has been assigned to clean toilets for two weeks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While the task is challenging, Blignaut said the family remains hopeful and prayerful that the time will pass quickly and that Ashley will be strengthened each day.","html":"While the task is challenging, Blignaut said the family remains hopeful and prayerful that the time will pass quickly and that Ashley will be strengthened each day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Blignaut also revealed that she has received documentation related to possible pardons, which she has forwarded to Ashley to review and help explain.","html":"Blignaut also revealed that she has received documentation related to possible pardons, which she has forwarded to Ashley to review and help explain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The documents reportedly relate to considerations being handled by authorities since October 2025.","html":"The documents reportedly relate to considerations being handled by authorities since October 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“We are quietly hopeful that there may be some encouraging news soon,” Blignaut said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ashley's Thai prison sentenced reducedAshley's mother starts Backabuddy campaignFree Ashley Oosthuizen: 5th birthday in Thai prisonAshely's appeal to be heard in Thai high courtAshley's mother settles in Thailand - 2nd appeal pendingAshley remains in Thai jailAshley's appeal heard in Thai courtPrecious 12½ min video call with AshleyPrison turns mother awayAshley remains upbeat in jailAshley out of isolationLeaked messages could've been 'anyone'Let's wear yellow for AshleyFree Ashley: Parents thankful for supportFree Ashley: Parents to open Trust Fund for donationsFree Ashley","html":"

  • Ashley's mother starts Backabuddy campaign
  • Free Ashley Oosthuizen: 5th birthday in Thai prison

  • Ashley's mother settles in Thailand - 2nd appeal pending

  • Prison turns mother away

  • Free Ashley
    • "}]

images.alt: Ashley Oosthuizen remains healthy and busy in Thai prison, says mother

author: Kristy  Kolberg
teaser: Ashley was recently disciplined after accidentally leaving her bag behind on Christmas Day. As punishment, she has been assigned to clean toilets for two weeks.
featuredCaption: Ashley and her mother during an in-contact visit some time ago. Photo: A Voice for Ashley Oosthuizen
